reviews.review_title: Storm old developer and owner here
reviews.review_description: I am terribly sorry about everyone's experience that year a lot of stuff was out of our control and we were having a hard time keeping the game up with staff issues and our staff doxxing and stuff so please accept my sincerest apology
The devas are new and not racists and servers work i just wish cosmetics work and there were more mods
The game is fun, but the adminвҖҷs and the owner is racist the spamming the N-word for one and two every lobby the end the stop banning players for no reason do not download on your own risk
The owners and admins are racist and finger painters have insta ban so donвҖҷt download it

This is a good game, but you should be careful with what mods you use, flying is illegal in infection, and is bannable, be careful about other mods too. Moderators and fingerpainters have instaban and will not wait to ban you, I got banned from long arms and mosa. Be careful. Be a good monke!!!

reviews.review_title: For anyone IвҖҷm co founder listen
reviews.review_description: So people have been getting banned by flying around fly tagging is not ban able no mods are if any mod or admin bans you for flying I will give them a demotion is ok to fly tag

It's a good gtag fan game. The Halloween update was great glad it's in the game. There is a glitch where if you are close to a wall where a map is it will unload current map and load map close to. Other than that great game
I've always wanted to have mods, Looking forward for ANOTHER UPDATE ITS BEEN A YEAR :(
This game is very scary because I heard foot steps coming up in to stump when I cold not move my arms
It's a good game

Very good and the mods are working g and not lagging  and good everything  I find and good game thanks (if you are going to download  this yes this game has mods no yezi camera mod and has its own mod menu)


I want mod and never get ban and I also want mod wich IвҖҷm getting tomorrow so IвҖҷm so excited for real my friend is a mod and nowвҖҷs Noah

People are mean and nice .   People fly tag  itвҖҷs too annoying !
Met the admin I think heвҖҷs admin 
But thatвҖҷs all I have to say .
Hey owner could i be a co owner because i am really nice and i will be responsible and  i would love to have a stick because people wonвҖҷt stop doing bad stuff on this game i am also 13 years old

reviews.review_title: Love it I need the discord name
reviews.review_description: I love this game I need to join discord to get mod I have footage of people with bad names impersonators  someone charasing the server

I WANTED TO BE COM THE PLUSHY!!!
But over all it's a pretty good game, would recommend

reviews.review_title: this is a best game on app
reviews.review_description: my TikTok account is cupvr73 a fun game on app
I want mod i dont know what the discord is called but i love this game and (i think its better then gorilla tag- in my opinionпҝј
there are 5 year olds with moderator that will ban you рҹҳҠрҹ«ө

You canвҖҷt just DOX someone because theyвҖҷre hacking! You put their IP on update board and that is NOT OKAY because they could be tracked down, kidnapped, or even killed! And the only way for them to get out of it is to move! This probably put LOTS of stress on them AND their parents because this situation is LIFE THREATENING! 1 star.

Good game I would read it a 10 out of 10 because of its variety and difference from other games and it really stands out compared to other games because you can do whatever you want in here and no matter what youвҖҷre doing. You can have fun with it and itвҖҷs just really fun to run around and juke monkeys. пҝј
